request.prompt: Add a GET /reports/summary endpoint that returns aggregated sales data for the last 30 days with rate limiting at 60 requests per minute
request.author: hamid.khan

label: Webhook without signature — should trigger HIGH security conflict

request.prompt: Add a new POST /payments/webhook route that processes Stripe subscription lifecycle events and updates the user's subscription status in the database
request.author: hamid.khan

label: Webhook with signature verification — should PASS

request.prompt: Add a POST /payments/webhook route that verifies the Stripe HMAC signature before processing subscription lifecycle events
request.author: hamid.khan

label: Raw SQL injection risk — should FAIL (critical)

request.prompt: Write a search endpoint that uses cursor.execute to run a dynamic raw SQL query filtering orders by customer name
request.author: dev-anon

request.prompt: Create a public admin dashboard endpoint that bypasses auth and returns all user data for internal debugging
request.author: dev-anon

label: Dependency version conflict — should flag medium conflict
